subject: Define Ventures x HDIM - AI-native healthcare quality infrastructure
body:
Hi Define Ventures team,

I lead HDIM (HealthData-in-Motion), where we built a production-grade healthcare quality platform with an AI-native engineering approach.

Why this may fit your thesis:
- Real-time quality and care-gap infrastructure (vs batch legacy workflows)
- FHIR-native, event-driven architecture for payer/provider integration
- Mid-market GTM wedge with strong unit economics focus

We recently completed a deep architecture + release evidence package and would value a short conversation to share traction, product direction, and fundraising plans.

If helpful, I can send a concise 1-page summary and a 10-minute product walkthrough link first.

Best,
Aaron
aaron@mahoosuc.solutions
https://healthdatainmotion.com

notes.thesisFit: Healthcare-native fund aligned with value-based care infrastructure.
